title: Baton Customer Journeys
description: The critical customer journeys artefact (Rule 10): an ordered, version-controlled, human-ratified set of end-to-end journeys. Walkthrough attestations are a separate record (attestations-v1).

version.description: Artefact schema version for forward compatibility.

ratification.description: Human ratification of the artefact (Rule 10). The gate fails closed unless ratified is true. Grouped so it can grow (e.g. scope, method) without a breaking change.

ratified.description: True when a human has ratified the artefact.

user_type.description: The user type taking this journey.

entry_surface.description: Where the journey begins (route, command, screen).

has_regression.description: True when an automated regression guards this journey.

regression_test_path.description: Path to the regression test asserted by has_regression. Present once has_regression is true.

no_mock_boundary.description: The entitlement/infra boundary that must cross real infrastructure (not mock) when this journey is walked (Rule 10 enforcement). Absence means no boundary is declared for this journey.

surface.description: The surface this step acts on.
